examples: Was there any use of buying Dilcey if she was going to mope about the child?
A little bird doesn't mope around because it isn't an eagle, or because another bird discovers tasty food.
Please, young women, smile or simper or smirk or grin, glower or glare, or just mope about if you like, but for the love of God, please put away the duck face.
We can plead ignorance, mope or complain, or we can see in Hurricane Irene the inspiration for a new energy age.
Ever the optimist, he is not one to mope about his health.
